issues.description: validate_dedicated_verification can return a false positive when implementation sessions are missing engine metadata: it discards None work-session engines, then accepts any completed verification session whose engine is not in the remaining set, so Q6 can be reported satisfied even though cross-provider cannot be confirmed.
issues.verificationMethod: Reasoned through validate_dedicated_verification with an empty work-engine baseline; 'v_engine not in work_engines' is vacuously true when work_engines is empty.
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: Validator test with a work session carrying orchestrator=None and a cross-provider-looking verification session asserts ok is False.
issues.resolution_notes: Added an empty-baseline guard: when work_engines is empty after discarding None, the validator returns ok=False (unconfirmable) with a corrective. New test test_fails_when_no_work_engine_baseline.

issues.description: derive_state classified advisory-disagreement as a terminal disposition, letting a disputed finding collapse to closed-dispositioned / closed-verified instead of escalating; the locked Q3 ladder routes a remediation dispute to awaiting-human.
issues.verificationMethod: Compared _TERMINAL_DISPOSITIONS membership against the Q3 ladder's 'open/dispute => awaiting-human' rule.
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: Derivation tests assert advisory-disagreement yields awaiting-human in both the verification and remediation branches.
issues.resolution_notes: Moved advisory-disagreement from _TERMINAL_DISPOSITIONS to _HUMAN_STOP_DISPOSITIONS. New tests test_remediation_advisory_disagreement_awaits_human and test_verification_advisory_disagreement_awaits_human.

issues.description: seed_issues_envelope only enforced non-empty issues; it did not reject a clean/VERIFIED verdict for an sN-issues file, violating the locked Set-055 presence-means-issues invariant and potentially mis-driving derive_state into closed-verified.
issues.verificationMethod: Inspected seed_issues_envelope guards against the Set-055 invariant 'presence of an sN-issues file means issues were found'.
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: Seeder test asserts a VERIFIED / empty / blank verdict raises ValueError.
issues.resolution_notes: Added a guard raising ValueError when verification_verdict is empty/blank or equals VERIFIED (case-insensitive). New test test_seed_rejects_verified_verdict.
